problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to neural, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
